productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Black Shoes
description: Style NoteClassic driving shoe with a sleek, constructed silhouette from U.S. Polo Association. These slip ons are designed for comfort but the styling on the upper makes it a love-forever classic. You'll love how this shoe adds a natty edge to your outfit and is as comfortable as your bathroom slippers (we're not kidding). The contrast stitch detail is the only design detail added and it only enhances the look of the shoe. Product DetailsBlack mid top boat shoe with slip- on styling, three hole lace-up, overlays and stitched detailing at the seams of the toe boxLeather straps looping through metal eyelets around the ankle regionPadded tongue and innerTPU outsole with herringbone and brick style groovesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
